steps.title: Identify the logic the text is building toward
steps.content: The text says doctors' credentialed status was outweighed by participants' views of the experiential relevance of the messengers. Former trial volunteers had actually been through what participants were considering; doctors hadn't.

steps.title: Match the explanation
steps.content:
A introduces a new claim about participants' own experience. C contradicts the text (it doesn't say doctors' experience was relevant). D introduces tone of messages, which the text doesn't discuss.

B directly captures the relevance argument: shared experience mattered more to participants than credentials. B is correct.
